zh.Constantinople,Istanbul,Turkey: 土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Irene Palaiologina Philanthropene於1249年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾時，她的父親Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine26歲，母親Théodora Doukaina Komnene Palaiologina Batatzaina9歲。她於大約1278年與Ivan Asen III, King of Bulgaria在土耳其易斯坦波爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1280年享年31歲。

zh-hans.Constantinople,Istanbul,Turkey: 土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Irene Palaiologina Philanthropene于1249年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾时，她的父亲Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine26岁，母亲Théodora Doukaina Komnene Palaiologina Batatzaina9岁。她于大约1278年与Ivan Asen III, King of Bulgaria在土耳其易斯坦波爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1280年享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Irene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Greek eirēnē ‘peace’ it was borne in Greek mythology by a minor goddess who personified peace, and by a Byzantine empress ( 752–803 ). The name was taken up in the English-speaking world at the end of the 19th century, and became popular in the 20th, partly as a result of being used as the name of a character in John Galsworthy's The Forsyte Saga ( 1922 ). It was formerly pronounced in three syllables, as in Greek, but is now thoroughly naturalized as an English name and usually pronounced as two syllables.

en.lifeSummary: When Irene Palaiologina Philanthropene was born in 1249, in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkiye, her father, Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine, was 26 and her mother, Théodora Doukaina Komnene Palaiologina Batatzaina, was 9. She married Ivan Asen III, King of Bulgaria about 1278, in İstanbul, Türkiye. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1280, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Irene Palaiologina Philanthropene est née en 1249, à Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquie, son père, Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Théodora Doukaina Komnene Palaiologina Batatzaina, avait 9 ans. Elle a épousé Ivan Asen III, King of Bulgaria environ 1278, à İstanbul, Turquie. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1280, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Irene Palaiologina Philanthropene 1249 in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkei geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine 26 und ihre Mutter Théodora Doukaina Komnene Palaiologina Batatzaina 9. Sie hat um 1278 in İstanbul, Türkei Ivan Asen III, King of Bulgaria geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1280 im Alter von 31 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Irene Palaiologina Philanthropene è nata il nel 1249 nel Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turchia, sua padre, Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Théodora Doukaina Komnene Palaiologina Batatzaina, aveva 9 anni. Lei sposato Ivan Asen III, King of Bulgaria circa 1278, nel İstanbul, Turchia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1280, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.Constantinople,Istanbul,Turkey: トルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブル
ja.lifeSummary: Irene Palaiologina Philanthropeneが1249年にトルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブルで生まれた時，父Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantineは26歳，母Théodora Doukaina Komnene Palaiologina Batatzainaは9歳であった。約1278年にトルコイスタンブルでIvan Asen III, King of Bulgariaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1280年に31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Irene Palaiologina Philanthropene(이)가 1249년 튀르키예 이스탠불 팻이h 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Théodora Doukaina Komnene Palaiologina Batatzaina(은)는 9세였다. 그녀는 대략 1278년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 Ivan Asen III, King of Bulgaria(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1280년 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Irene Palaiologina Philanthropene nasceu em 1249, em Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquia, seu pai, Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Théodora Doukaina Komnene Palaiologina Batatzaina, tinha 9 anos. Ela casou-se com Ivan Asen III, King of Bulgaria aproximadamente 1278, em İstanbul, Turquia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1280, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Irene Palaiologina Philanthropene родилась в 1249 г. в местности истанбул, фатих, истанбул, Турция, её отцу по имени Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Théodora Doukaina Komnene Palaiologina Batatzaina, 9. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ivan Asen III, King of Bulgaria около 1278 г. в местности истанбул, Турция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1280 г. в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Irene Palaiologina Philanthropene nació en 1249, en Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquía, su papá, Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Théodora Doukaina Komnene Palaiologina Batatzaina, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Ivan Asen III, King of Bulgaria aproximadamente 1278, en İstanbul, Turquía. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1280, a la edad de 31 años.
